name: Pack Of 20: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch - Tuna & Salmon Chunks in Jelly 100g
description: Reflex Plus Tuna & Salmon Chunks in Jelly Adult Cat Food in Pouch (Pack of 20) , fully-balanced, tuna & salmon protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.0 Moisture (%) - 0.3 Crude Ash (%) - 83 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20g/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (5% tuna, 5% salmon), minerals, inulin (0,1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
